s-1.ptxt: INSPECT CENTER AIRBAG SENSOR ASSEMBLY (VEHICLE NOT INVOLVED IN COLLISION)

s2.ptxt: Perform a diagnostic system check (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT CENTER AIRBAG SENSOR ASSEMBLY (VEHICLE INVOLVED IN COLLISION AND AIRBAG HAS NOT DEPLOYED)

s2.ptxt: Perform a diagnostic system check (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT CENTER AIRBAG SENSOR ASSEMBLY (VEHICLE INVOLVED IN COLLISION AND AIRBAG IS DEPLOYED)

s2.ptxt: Replace the center airbag sensor assembly.

atten2.ptxt: Be sure to follow the correct removal and installation procedures.

atten4.ptxt: The center airbag sensor assembly should be replaced after any of the airbags has deployed, as it has been subjected to the impact.
